atlas v0.9
返回网页家族 / Back To Families

网页家族 / Contemporary Web Family

精密产品界面型 Product Precision Interface

强调状态、层级和界面清晰度的产品型页面，气质服从任务，精度高于氛围。

历史源头 / Historical Roots

包豪斯 / Bauhaus

适配结构 / Structure Fit

工作台型 / Workbench / Tool Shell目录索引型 / Catalog Explorer

真实样本 / Sample Gallery

真实网站样本 / Live Website Samples

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

借法 / Interpretation

借这条家族的语法，不只模仿表面 / Borrow the grammar, not only the surface

识别特征 / Signature

  • tight spacing
  • clear CTA hierarchy
  • engineered polish
  • task-first framing

可借语法 / Borrow

  • precise spacing and copy discipline
  • screenshots that explain behavior
  • clear task and state hierarchy

适合内容 / Best For

  • AI tools
  • technical products
  • platform homepages
  • operator-facing tools

不适合时机 / Avoid When

  • the page is primarily cultural or editorial
  • atmosphere matters more than interface clarity

页面模式 / Page Patterns

这条家族常见会长成哪些页面组织 / The page patterns this family commonly becomes

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

产品演示说明型 Product Demo Explainer

Screenshots or staged scenes explain behavior or value, with copy framing the outcome and next action.

识别信号 / Cues

hero screenshot or product scenebenefit-led copyclear task hierarchy

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

证据模块堆栈型 Evidence Module Stack

The page alternates thesis, evidence, and navigation in labeled modules so density stays trustworthy.

识别信号 / Cues

section labelstopic blocksevidence-led content modules

历史源头 / Historical Roots

如果你喜欢这类网页，往前追会遇到哪几支 / Trace the earlier lineages behind it

1919-1933

Germany

包豪斯 Bauhaus

今天大量产品站和设计系统网站，仍在延续 Bauhaus 的功能主义、模块化和减少装饰的思想。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

精密产品界面型 / Product Precision Interface证据密集知识型 / Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
查看流派 / Open Movement

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格包 / A ready-to-use prompt packet

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

精密产品界面型 Product Precision Interface

Use a product-precision family: engineered hierarchy, crisp screenshots, strict spacing, and copy that frames tasks and outcomes before atmosphere.

参考链接 / Reference Packet

  • Stripe
  • Atlassian Foundations
